'''tïdænæsh''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:person|person]]".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-d-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:person|person]]
|-
! Citation form
| tïdænæsh
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tædinith|tædinith]] || [[word:tædinij|tædinij]] || [[word:tædinish|tædinish]] || [[word:tædini|tædini]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tadudunuth|tadudunuth]] || [[word:tadudunuj|tadudunuj]] || [[word:tadudunush|tadudunush]] || [[word:tadudunu|tadudunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tadunuth|tadunuth]] || [[word:tadunuj|tadunuj]] || [[word:tadunush|tadunush]] || [[word:tadunu|tadunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tadufnuth|tadufnuth]] || [[word:tadufnuj|tadufnuj]] || [[word:tadufnush|tadufnush]] || [[word:tadufnuf|tadufnuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tædeneth|tædeneth]] || [[word:tædenej|tædenej]] || [[word:tædenesh|tædenesh]] || [[word:tædene|tædene]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tadodonoth|tadodonoth]] || [[word:tadodonoj|tadodonoj]] || [[word:tadodonosh|tadodonosh]] || [[word:tadodono|tadodono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tadonoth|tadonoth]] || [[word:tadonoj|tadonoj]] || [[word:tadonosh|tadonosh]] || [[word:tadono|tadono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tadofnoth|tadofnoth]] || [[word:tadofnoj|tadofnoj]] || [[word:tadofnosh|tadofnosh]] || [[word:tadofnof|tadofnof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[paucal]] || [[word:tadïfnïfth|tadïfnïfth]] || [[word:tadïfnïfj|tadïfnïfj]] || [[word:tadïfnïfsh|tadïfnïfsh]] || [[word:tadïfnïf|tadïfnïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plentiful]] || [[word:tadïfdïfnïfth|tadïfdïfnïfth]] || [[word:tadïfdïfnïfj|tadïfdïfnïfj]] || [[word:tadïfdïfnïfsh|tadïfdïfnïfsh]] || [[word:tadïfdïfnïf|tadïfdïfnïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tædænæth|tædænæth]] || [[word:tædænæj|tædænæj]] || [[word:tædænæsh|tædænæsh]] || [[word:tædænæ|tædænæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tadadanath|tadadanath]] || [[word:tadadanaj|tadadanaj]] || [[word:tadadanash|tadadanash]] || [[word:tadadana|tadadana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tadanath|tadanath]] || [[word:tadanaj|tadanaj]] || [[word:tadanash|tadanash]] || [[word:tadana|tadana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tadafnath|tadafnath]] || [[word:tadafnaj|tadafnaj]] || [[word:tadafnash|tadafnash]] || [[word:tadafnaf|tadafnaf]]
|}

''56 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tadanatha|tadanatha]] || [[word:tadanaja|tadanaja]] || [[word:tadanasha|tadanasha]] || [[word:tadanaka|tadanaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tadanath|tadanath]] || [[word:tadanaj|tadanaj]] || [[word:tadanash|tadanash]] || [[word:tadana|tadana]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tadanathal|tadanathal]] || [[word:tadanajal|tadanajal]] || [[word:tadanashal|tadanashal]] || [[word:tadanakal|tadanakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tadanathatha|tadanathatha]] || [[word:tadanajaja|tadanajaja]] || [[word:tadanashasha|tadanashasha]] || [[word:tadanaka|tadanaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tadanathan|tadanathan]] || [[word:tadanajan|tadanajan]] || [[word:tadanashan|tadanashan]] || [[word:tadanakan|tadanakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tadanathaoro|tadanathaoro]] || [[word:tadanajaoro|tadanajaoro]] || [[word:tadanashaoro|tadanashaoro]] || [[word:tadanakaoro|tadanakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
